Golden hour cinematic still of SCARLETT wearing a loose linen shirt sitting on a weathered wooden bench along the Bondi Beach promenade with knees pulled up to her chest, twisting open a lipstick tube and applying it to her lips while gazing out at the ocean horizon, wind gently lifting strands of hair across her face in a moment of quiet tension before the next gesture, soft beige sand and pale horizon visible behind the bench with gentle waves rolling in the distance, warm directional sunlight casting long golden highlights and soft shadows across the scene, shallow depth of field with natural coastal breeze atmosphere, captured on anamorphic lens with warm color grading and filmic texture in the style of modern lifestyle editorial photography

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Wide promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
